title: Why pick between SD and microSD when your laptop slot could do both?
summary: I forgot to bring my USB-C SD adapters to CES last year — but now that the $25 BaseQi lives inside my notebook, that won’t be a problem! If you buy something from a Verge link, Vox Media may earn a commission.
